data.name: Mythology Waifus Mahjong
data.detailed_description:
OUR GAMES



關於此遊戲

Solve mahjong puzzles and fight against the prettiest girls! Match the tiles in groups of three to attack, will you manage to inflict enough damage or will you get defeated?

Enjoy this mythological-themed mix of classic mahjong and combat.

Pixel art and HD CGs will unlock with your progress, you can view them in the gallery.

Features:
  • Matching 3 gameplay (mahjong)
  • Beautiful mythological art
  • 60 levels
  • Image gallery
  • 7 different waifus

data.short_description: Will you be able to defeat all the strong girls? Fight against beautiful mythological warriors in this mythological-themed mix of classic mahjong and combat.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文, 韓文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: AMD Athlon

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20
